jobs.title: Engineering Manager, Merchant Experience
jobs.content: <p><strong>Engineering Manager, Merchant Experience</strong></p><p>Recharge is the Shopify-native subscription-commerce platform pioneered around the recurring-product-billing data model & the Shopify-subscription-commerce segment.</p>

jobs.title: Strategic Finance Senior Analyst, GTM
jobs.content: <p>Lead Recharge's Strategic Finance function across the Subscriptions / Customer Portal / Bundles / Rewards platform.</p>
